note: Provenance marker for the public export produced by the sanitize-and-sync process. 'source_commit' is the internal source-of-truth commit the top-level tree (skill/, skill-fix-verify/, local_harness/, tests/local_harness/) was synced from. 'additional_sources' record other components exported from separate internal repos, keyed by the destination subtree; each 'commit' is that subtree's upstream baseline for the next re-sync (diff commit..HEAD). All values are opaque SHAs and do not expose internal code; the internal repo names are recorded only in the internal difference log, not here.
